potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall check if everything is working upon power-on.
The system shall stop if there is a problem during startup.
The system shall become ready to use if everything is fine during startup.
The system shall allow the user to reset it when it is ready to use.
The system shall allow the user to activate it when it is ready to use.
The system shall allow the user to turn it off when it is ready to use.
The system shall start monitoring if it is activated.
The system shall continue monitoring if it turns out to be a false alarm or the time ends.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If there is a problem, it stops. If everything is fine, it becomes ready to use.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall stop if there is a problem during startup.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When it is ready to use, the user can reset it, activate it, or turn it off.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow the user to reset it when it is ready to use.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When it is ready to use, the user can reset it, activate it, or turn it off.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow the user to activate it when it is ready to use.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When it is ready to use, the user can reset it, activate it, or turn it off.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow the user to turn it off when it is ready to use.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall start monitoring if it is activated.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not explicitly state that the system starts monitoring upon activation, only that it 'starts monitoring' when a sensor is triggered.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall continue monitoring if it turns out to be a false alarm or the time ends.
hallucinations.reason: The source text states that the system continues monitoring after a false alarm or at the end of the time, but does not explicitly state that this is done 'continuously'.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall allow the user to reset it when it is ready to use.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall allow the user to turn it off when it is ready to use.
duplicates.reason: Both requirements are redundant as they both pertain to user actions while the system is 'ready to use'.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall start monitoring if a sensor is triggered during monitoring.
ambiguities.reason: It's unclear from the source text whether 'during monitoring' refers to any time after activation or specifically when a sensor is triggered.
